title: Nexus Permission Contract
description: Schema for permissions.json — the canonical role → permission map. Validated in CI before any contract version is tagged. v1.3.0 schema: perms are objects with `name` and `scope` (one of self, platform, project, platform/project). v1.5.0 schema: the name regex now allows 3-or-4 colon-delimited segments, enabling perms like `mercury:connection_slack:revoke:self` (sub-resource in segment 3, action in segment 4) and `mercury:auth_config_apple:create`. The reserved `:self` suffix remains the scope marker on the final segment.

version.description: Semver. Bumped on any contract change. SDKs pin to a specific version.

permissions.description: Perm vocabulary. Each service maps to an array of perm objects. Each perm has a `name` (matching the platform's {service}:{resource}:{action} convention) and a `scope` (one of: self, platform, project, platform/project).

role_permissions.description: Static role → permission map. Only contains `platform` and `platform/project` scope perms; `self` perms are universal (resolver grants them implicitly); `project` perms are tenant-user only (granted via TenantRole, not in this map).

owner_only_permissions.description: Optional helper field. Lists platform-scope perms that should appear ONLY in OWNER's role_permissions. Validated against role_permissions by scripts/validate.mjs. (Destructive perms — no delegation to ADMIN.)
